The '''Swaze''' were a technologically advanced people from the [[Jidlor system/Legends|Jidlor system]]. Though they had an advanced culture, with access to [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technology, they revered the wisdom of the comparatively primitive [[Rellarin]] people of [[Rellnas Minor]]. Every year, the Swaze leaders would go to Rellnas Minor to seek advice from the Rellarin tribal leaders and sages, the [[un'Yala]].
